chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 36 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.01.2026 For orders on MA 138/26 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 139/26 For hearing of main case Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhatti, Advocate along with applicant 1. Urgent granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Rizwan Ahmed is nominated as accused in Crime No. 173 of 2025 registered at Police Station Airport district Shaheed Benazirabad under Sections 406, 419 & 420 PPC. Learned counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; and, that the applicant being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, he is apprehensive that before reaching trial court he might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced. He therefore seeks legal shelter. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of ten days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the amount of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case, the applicant fails to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of ten days i.e. 23.01.2026 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
